results.caption: A colorful market stall displays Vietnamese conical hats, fans, and scarves with "alamy" watermarks.
A bustling street scene in front of the Dong Xuan Market, decorated with colorful balloons and flags. Text: ĐỒNG XUÂN PHỐ CỔ. suitable for background image
Three women in colorful traditional clothing sell embroidered bags at a market with watermarks.
